languages.text:
Cyber Mastif has +15 Weapon Skill and Strength, and +200% Damage
Cyber Mastiff has 100% chance to cancel the movement of {g|f:3311f1213a1e452c874ce2cde5c03f59}Apprehended{/g} enemy on Attack of Opportunity hit.

languages.text:
The cyber-mastiff gains +15 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} and deals +150% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
The cyber-mastiff's {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} against the {g|f:f39e0e323f314259b3e7510b110d3a4b}apprehended{/g} target always cancel its movement.

languages.text:
Siber mastif, +15 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Silah Yeteneği{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Kuvvet{/g} niteliği kazanır. +%150 daha fazla {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasar{/g} verir.
Siber mastifin {g|f:f39e0e323f314259b3e7510b110d3a4b}göz hapsindeki{/g} hedefe yaptığı {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}fırsat saldırıları{/g}, hedefin hareketini her zaman iptal eder.

languages.text:
El cibermastín recibe +15 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Habilidad de armas{/g} y {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Fuerza{/g} e inflige un +150 % de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g} adicional.
Los {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}ataques de oportunidad{/g} del cibermastín contra el objetivo {g|f:f39e0e323f314259b3e7510b110d3a4b}apresado{/g} siempre cancelan su movimiento.

traits.locale_text:
El cibermastín recibe +15 de Habilidad de armas y Fuerza e inflige un +150 % de daño adicional.
Los ataques de oportunidad del cibermastín contra el objetivo {g|f:f39e0e323f314259b3e7510b110d3a4b}apresado{/g} siempre cancelan su movimiento.

languages.text:
生化獒犬的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}力量{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}武器技能{/g}提高15点，造成的{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}提高150%。
生化獒犬对被{g|f:f39e0e323f314259b3e7510b110d3a4b}捕获{/g}的目标进行{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}借机攻击{/g}时，必定会打断目标移动。
languages.original_text:
The cyber-mastiff gains +15 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} and deals +150% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
The cyber-mastiff's {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} against the {g|f:f39e0e323f314259b3e7510b110d3a4b}apprehended{/g} target always cancel its movement.

traits.locale_text:
生化獒犬的力量、武器技能提高15点，造成的伤害提高150%。
生化獒犬对被{g|f:f39e0e323f314259b3e7510b110d3a4b}捕获{/g}的目标进行借机攻击时，必定会打断目标移动。

languages.text:
Der Cyber-Mastiff erhält +15 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Waffenfähigkeit{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Stärke{/g} und verursacht +150 % mehr {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Schaden{/g}.
Die {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}Gelegenheitsangriffe{/g} des Cyber-Mastiffs auf das {g|f:f39e0e323f314259b3e7510b110d3a4b}gefasste{/g} Ziel unterbrechen immer dessen Bewegung.
languages.original_text:
The cyber-mastiff gains +15 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} and deals +150% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
The cyber-mastiff's {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} against the {g|f:f39e0e323f314259b3e7510b110d3a4b}apprehended{/g} target always cancel its movement.

traits.locale_text:
Der Cyber-Mastiff erhält +15 Waffenfähigkeit und Stärke und verursacht +150 % mehr Schaden.
Die Gelegenheitsangriffe des Cyber-Mastiffs auf das {g|f:f39e0e323f314259b3e7510b110d3a4b}gefasste{/g} Ziel unterbrechen immer dessen Bewegung.

languages.text:
Le cyber-mastiff reçoit un bonus de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Capacité de combat{/g} et de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Force{/g} de +15 et inflige +150 % de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} supplémentaires.
Les {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attaques d'opportunité{/g} du cyber-mastiff contre la cible {g|f:f39e0e323f314259b3e7510b110d3a4b}appréhendée{/g} annulent toujours ses déplacements.
languages.original_text:
The cyber-mastiff gains +15 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Weapon Skill{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Strength{/g} and deals +150% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
The cyber-mastiff's {g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}attacks of opportunity{/g} against the {g|f:f39e0e323f314259b3e7510b110d3a4b}apprehended{/g} target always cancel its movement.

traits.locale_text:
Le cyber-mastiff reçoit un bonus de Capacité de combat et de Force de +15 et inflige +150 % de dégâts supplémentaires.
Les attaques d'opportunité du cyber-mastiff contre la cible {g|f:f39e0e323f314259b3e7510b110d3a4b}appréhendée{/g} annulent toujours ses déplacements.

languages.text:
サイバーマスチフの武器スキルと腕力が+15され、与えるダメージが+150%上昇する。
サイバーマスチフの{g|f:f39e0e323f314259b3e7510b110d3a4b}捕縛された{/g}ターゲットに対する機会攻撃は、その移動を常にキャンセルする。

languages.text:
Кибермастиф получает +15 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWeaponSkill}Ближнему Бою{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerStrength}Силе{/g} и +150% к наносимому {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урону{/g}.
{g|Encyclopedia:AttackOfOpportunityFullGlossary}Атаки по возможности{/g}, совершаемые кибермастифом против {g|f:f39e0e323f314259b3e7510b110d3a4b}цели захвата{/g}, всегда прерывают ее движение.

Кибермастиф получает +15 к Ближнему Бою и Силе и +150% к наносимому урону.
Атаки по возможности, совершаемые кибермастифом против {g|f:f39e0e323f314259b3e7510b110d3a4b}цели захвата{/g}, всегда прерывают ее движение.
